description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these yacht lifestyle shoes from timberland. This shoe is a fresh take on the classic design and looks cool both on the yacht and off it.UpperLeather upper for comfort and protectionCentral two hole lace-ups for a snug FitLeather lining for greater comfortCushioned insole for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleFlat rubber outsole with thin herringbone patterned groovesShoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
